name: SAG_DGV
description: National digital strategy alignment, eGovernment framework, cloud-first policy, intergovernmental coordination, and open standards compliance.

name: SAG_PDP
description: Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) requirements: lawful processing, consent, data subject rights, breach notification, retention, and DPO designation.

name: SAG_CLD
description: SITA sovereign cloud requirements: data residency in South Africa, local key management, government network connectivity, background-checked personnel, exit strategy.

name: SAG_NET
description: Government network segmentation, secure internet gateway, private connectivity to PaaS services, and network traffic inspection.

name: SAG_IAM
description: Government identity federation, MFA enforcement, privileged access management, and security clearance integration.

name: SAG_DAT
description: Data classification, encryption with CMK, secure data sanitization, and government records management.

name: SAG_SEC
description: Government SOC integration, threat intelligence sharing, security event correlation, and vulnerability management.

name: SAG_GOV
description: POPIA, SITA Act, PFMA, and Public Service Regulations compliance, government audit requirements, and change management.

name: SAG_BCM
description: Critical service availability, DR requirements with RTOs/RPOs, national emergency preparedness, and restoration priority.
